## 📚 Target Registry
Which registry? (IC-REG-001 through IC-REG-006)

## 📝 Proposed Entry
```json
{
  "identifier": "your_identifier",
  "definition": "Clear, concise definition",
  "namespace": "core|ext|reg"
}
```

## Justification
Why is this addition necessary? What problem does it solve?

## Use Case
Practical examples of how this would be used.

## Related Concepts
How does this relate to existing registry entries?

## Usage Examples
Concrete examples of usage in specifications or implementations.

## Backward Compatibility
Does this addition maintain backward compatibility? Are there any breaking changes?

## References
Related ADRs, specifications, or concepts.

## ✅ Alignment
- [ ] Aligns with Constitution
- [ ] Doesn't redefine existing concepts
- [ ] Follows consistent terminology
- [ ] Includes clear definition
